//1: THE PROFILE (Snowflake stage-sourced) — same content as the GitHub
//2: profile, but sources point at a Snowflake stage instead of GitHub.
//3: Use this for internal teams where access is governed by Snowflake roles.
//4: TO CUSTOMIZE: replace @YOUR_DB.YOUR_SCHEMA.YOUR_STAGE with your stage,
//5: and the REPLACE_WITH_* values. Then publish with: cortex profile publish.
//7: Note: //-prefixed keys are comments; the app ignores them on load.
name: team-perspective
description: Stage-backed version of the team perspective profile. All sources point at a Snowflake stage, so users on this account can add it from Agent Settings without touching GitHub.
